extDescription.message: Finding my questions in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok

extDefaultTitle.description: The default title of the extension's action.

popupTitle.description: The title of the popup window.

popupHeader.description: The header text in the popup window.

emptyMessageLine1.description: First line of the message shown when no questions are found.

emptyMessageLine2.message: Ask a question on a ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, or Grok page, and it will appear here.
emptyMessageLine2.description: Second line of the message shown when no questions are found.

contentScriptNotAvailable.message: Content script not available. Showing empty message.
contentScriptNotAvailable.description: Error message for developers in the console.

favoritesHeader.description: Header for the favorites section in the popup.

questionsHeader.description: Header for the full question list section in the popup.

scanning.description: Badge shown in the page while scanning a long conversation.

imageAttachment.description: Identifier shown for a question that has only an image attachment and no text.

imageLabel.description: Label used in the attachment list for an uploaded image.

attachmentSuffix.description: Word appended after attachment file names, e.g. 'report.pdf attached'.
